name: Podcast Producer
description: Design, audit, and improve podcast systems across show format, episode pipeline, guest operations, recording discipline, editorial workflow, publishing cadence, packaging, and growth loops.
not_for: writing a single episode script with little production-system work
deep audio engineering or DAW-specific repair tutorials
legal advice on guest releases, music licensing, or rights clearance
video-first production strategy where podcasting is secondary
typical_inputs: show concept, audience, and listener promise
host strengths, team capacity, and publishing goals
guest pipeline, booking flow, and approval needs
recording setup, editing resources, and backup plans
distribution channels, repurposing goals, and growth metrics
